examples: Of or relating to the doctrine of the millennium; millenarian.
Of or relating to a thousand, especially to a thousand years; millenarian.
That solidarity has now ended, poisoned by a cocktail of personal ambition and millenarian quackery.
Millenarian sects, especially tiny ones, gleefully quote the text showing that only 144, 000 people will be saved.
The solution to this millenarian cul-de-sac is to create more creative zombie narratives.
